{{Infobox character
| name = Nathanael Bareius
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
| name = Nathanael Bareius
| aliases = Lord Bareius, Bareius
| appears_in = The Elder Empire: Sea, The Elder Empire: Shadow
| titles = Guild Head of Kanatalia, Head of the Alchemist’s Guild, Lord Bareius, Guild Head
| abilities = alchemist
| affiliations = Alchemists' Guild, group led by Estyr
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

''See also: [[Nathanael Bareius Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Nathanael Bareius, also known as [[Naberius Clayborn]] or [[Lord]] Bareius, is a prominent and immensely wealthy figure within the [[Aurelian Empire]]. He serves as the [[Guild]] Head of [[Kanatalia]] and is a leader within the [[Alchemist's Guild]]. Described as a polished, bookish man with dark, wavy hair and thick-rimmed glasses, he often presents himself with a theatrical or business-like demeanor, frequently wearing high-quality, tailored suits. His background includes heritage from both [[Erin]] and [[Vandenyas]]. As a powerful political and economic player, Bareius is noted for his extensive global business connections and his tendency to prioritize profit and stability over personal sentiment. He is a master negotiator who has been described as a snake-like figure, often using his wealth and private security forces to navigate conflicts. While some view him as a mythic figure of immense influence, others see him as untrustworthy. His role in the empire is significant enough that he has been discussed as a potential candidate for the throne, though his survival and true intentions remain subjects of contention among various [[Guild]] leaders and officials.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Nathanael Bareius]] is a source of [[Shiftapple Ninety-six]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c2">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Nathanael Bareius]] will do everything he can to avoid a war.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Nathanael Bareius]] is a person whose term for a mood was used.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Nathanael Bareius]] is a potential leader of the [[Aurelian Empire]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28" />}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Nathanael Bareius]] is the [[Guild]] Head of [[Kanatalia]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Lord]] Bareius gave [[Meia]] a canister with a pink cap.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c24">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Nathanael Bareius]] is the [[Head of the Alchemist’s Guild]] and the richest man in the world.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c26">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Nathanael Bareius]] is a person whose handiwork [[Meia]] is familiar with.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c2">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Nathanael Bareius]] was considered the father of Bliss.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c21">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Bareius is an alchemist.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c21" />}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Nathanael Bareius is a bespectacled alchemist from [[Kanatalia]] who serves as the [[Guild]] Head of the [[Alchemists]]. Recognized as the richest man in the world, he funds alchemical endeavors and owns various printing-houses. During a meeting, he may utilize a proxy, though he is also seen present and shuffling through papers. While Bareius has issued orders to [[Rina]] and claimed to be the father of Bliss, she does not consider him her father. Despite knowing that Bliss is the Head of the [[Blackwatch]], he avoids harming her because she is difficult to replace, even though she remains someone who can seek revenge against him.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Bareius is an alchemist who may send a proxy to the meeting.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Nathanael Bareius]] is from [[Kanatalia]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Bareius is funding the alchemists.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c5">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Nathanael Bareius]] is the richest man in the world.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Bareius is a bespectacled alchemist standing to the right of [[Estyr]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Nathanael Bareius]] is the [[Guild]] Head of the [[Alchemists]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c11">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Bareius issued orders to [[Rina]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Nathanael Bareius]] owns printing-houses.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c13">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Nathanael Bareius]] claimed to be Bliss's father.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Bareius knows Bliss is the Head of the [[Blackwatch]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Bareius avoids harming Bliss because she is difficult to replace.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Bareius is present and has been shuffling through papers.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Nathanael Bareius]] is someone Bliss can seek revenge on.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Nathanael Bareius]] is Bliss's father.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Bliss does not consider [[Nathanael Bareius]] to be her father.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23" />}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Nathanael Bareius is a bookish [[Guild]] Head with slicked-back hair and thick-rimmed glasses who possesses immense wealth, earning him a reputation as the richest man in the world. While he expressed hesitation regarding a peace deal between the [[Guilds]], he maintained his power through hundreds of global business contacts and ownership of various printing-houses. As a member of [[Estyr]]'s group, he stood to the leader's right and chose to pull his alchemists away from the [[Champions]]. During a period when he was under the influence of an augmentation potion, he even intervened to wave [[Shera]] back from falling. Despite his status as a powerful equal to [[Shera]] and a potential sponsor for Yala, he remained a man of nervous energy who maintained paranoid levels of protection against assassination. Ultimately, his actions and associations led [[Shera]] to suspect him of conspiring with Jyrine and [[Calder]] [[Marten]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Bareius is hesitant about a deal for peace between the [[Guilds]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Bareius is unlikely to disarm regardless of what he says.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c4">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Nathanael Bareius]] is a bookish man with slicked-back hair and thick-rimmed glasses.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Bareius is described as the richest man in the world.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Nathanael Bareius]] shivered.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Nathanael Bareius]] has hundreds of business contacts worldwide.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Nathanael Bareius]] pulled his alchemists away from the [[Champions]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Bareius is part of the group led by [[Estyr]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Bareius stands to [[Estyr]]'s right.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Bareius was under the effect of an augmentation potion.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Bareius waved at [[Shera]] to stop her from dropping.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Bareius sat at the head of the table and showed nervous energy.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c10">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Nathanael Bareius]] is described as the man with the deepest pockets.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Bareius is someone Yala has been talking to about sponsoring.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Bareius owns printing-houses.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Nathanael Bareius]] is a [[Guild]] Head and an equal to [[Shera]] in power and influence.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Bareius brought a couple of servants who were alchemists.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Bareius walked to the edge of the deck of [[The Final Solution]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Bareius has protections against assassination that have reached paranoid levels.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Bareius is a person [[Shera]] suspected of conspiring with [[Calder]] [[Marten]] and Jyrine.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|“I no longer recognize Nathanael Bareius as my father,” Bliss said, and her voice had grown cold.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c21" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|“It was the alchemists, wasn't it? This new boy, Bareius?”<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c21" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
